entity: Kareem Abdul-Jabbar All-NBA selections = 15 (BBR-canonical and warehouse value agree)

query_target.sql: SELECT cast(count(*) AS INTEGER) AS n FROM stg_bref_end_of_season_teams WHERE nba_player_id = 76003 AND lg = 'NBA' AND type = 'All-NBA'

notes: Kareem's 15 All-NBA selections (record at the time, later broken by LeBron/Kobe/Duncan). BBR and warehouse agree exactly. equals 15 catches any drift in either direction. CAST(... AS INTEGER) keeps the count as a JSON number (not BIGINT-as-string) so the equals comparison is numeric.
